Metro HVAC Services — Established Residential & Light Commercial HVAC Business

Asking Price: $1,250,000
SDE: $285,000 (trailing 12 months)
Revenue: $820,000 (2024)

Location: Broward County, Florida
Years in Business: 18
Full-Time Employees: 8
Monthly Rent: $4,200

Manager in place. Owner works 15 hours/week in sales. Strong recurring maintenance contracts. Lease expires in 4 years.
